$comment: Single source of truth for agent checkpoint schema. Consumed by: (1) checkpoint-server.js for runtime validation, (2) fabric-shell-dev-agent.md and skill files for documentation. Format: { type, description?, properties?, items?, required?, enum? }. type='any' skips deep validation.

schemaVersion.description: Checkpoint format version — for future migration if the schema changes.

workItemId.description: Azure DevOps work item ID — the primary key for all operations.

workItemType.description: Bug, Task, Feature, or User Story — needed for phase-skip decisions.

workItemTitle.description: Work item title — used in resume messages and PR descriptions.

branch.description: Git branch name — used during rehydration to git checkout to the correct branch.

lastUpdated.description: ISO timestamp of last checkpoint write — auto-set by the MCP server, do NOT pass manually.

activePhase.description: Current phase name (e.g. 'devImplementation') — used by the routing matrix to resume.

activeStep.description: Current step within the active phase (e.g. 'devImplementation.4') — used to resume from the exact step.

errorRecovery.description: Error log — prevents repeating failed approaches across sessions.

reasoningTrace.description: Append-only log of decisions, findings, and observations — the primary rehydration source. Minimum one entry per step.

phase.description: Phase name this entry belongs to.

content.description: The reasoning, finding, or decision made.

workItemAnalysis.description: Phase 1 — deep analysis of the work item: text, images, videos, hierarchy, specs, designs.

startedAt.description: ISO timestamp when phase started — auto-filled by MCP server.

completedAt.description: ISO timestamp when phase completed — auto-filled by MCP server.

stepsCompleted.description: Step IDs completed (e.g. ['workItemAnalysis.1', 'workItemAnalysis.2']). Always send the FULL cumulative array.

workItemRaw.description: Raw work item JSON from getWorkItems API — opaque, stored as-is.

comments.description: Work item discussion comments from getWorkItemComments API.

hierarchyItems.description: Parent Feature, User Stories, and related hierarchy items. Format: [{ id, type, relationship, title, description, comments, rawJson }].

relatedItems.description: Related work items (dependencies, similar bugs). Format: [{ id, type, relationKind, title, description, comments, rawJson }].

images.description: Images downloaded from attachments, description, and comments.

url.description: Original Azure DevOps URL of the image.

localPath.description: Local file path where the image was downloaded.

source.description: Where the image was found: 'attachment', 'description', or 'comment'.

analysis.description: Visual analysis of the image — multi-sentence description of what is shown.

videos.description: Videos/GIFs downloaded from attachments and inline links — with extracted frames, audio transcript, and unified timeline.

url.description: Original Azure DevOps URL of the video.

localPath.description: Local file path where the video was downloaded.

source.description: Where the video was found: 'attachment', 'description', or 'comment'.

frames.description: Extracted frame images with visual analysis. Each frame must have an 'analysis' from actually viewing the image.

path.description: Local file path to the extracted frame PNG.

analysis.description: Multi-sentence visual description of the frame: UI state, focus position, screen reader output, errors, changes from previous frame.

audio.description: Transcribed audio track. Null for GIFs or videos without audio.

summary.description: Unified timeline correlating frame analysis with audio transcript by timestamp. MUST NOT be empty if frames exist.

extractionFailed.description: True if frame/audio extraction failed (fallback to user description).

userDescription.description: User-provided description of the video content (fallback when extraction fails).

pmSpecs.description: PM spec documents found in work item, hierarchy, or wiki. Format: [{ url, source, sourceWorkItemId, summary, fullContent }].

uxDesigns.description: UX design links (Figma, etc.) found in work item or hierarchy. Format: [{ url, sourceWorkItemId }].

devDesigns.description: Dev design documents found in work item or hierarchy. Format: [{ url, source, sourceWorkItemId, summary, fullContent }].

structuredSummary.description: Structured analysis summary produced in step 8 — consumed by the clarification phase.

type.description: Work item type: Bug, Task, Feature, or User Story.

title.description: Concise descriptive title for the work item.

description.description: Problem description — what is wrong or what is needed.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Acceptance criteria derived from the work item and specs.

hierarchyItems.description: Summary of parent Feature and sibling User Stories context.

pmSpecs.description: Summary of PM specs found (or 'None found').

uxDesigns.description: Summary of UX designs found (or 'None found').

devDesigns.description: Summary of dev designs found (or 'None found').

ambiguities.description: Open questions that need clarification before proceeding. REQUIRED — the clarification phase reads this.

clarification.description: Phase 2 — resolve ambiguities from work item analysis by asking the user targeted questions.

questionsAsked.description: Questions asked to the user and their answers.

decisions.description: Decisions that affect later phases (scope, approach, priority).

pmSpec.description: Phase 3 — PM specification drafting and approval. Skippable for bugs/tasks.

existingSpecSearch.description: Results of searching for existing specs in hierarchy, wiki, and attachments.

draft.description: Current spec draft text (updated on each feedback round).

feedbackRounds.description: User feedback rounds. Format: [{ round, userFeedback, agentRevision, timestamp }].

approvedAt.description: ISO timestamp when user approved the spec.

postedToWI.description: Whether the spec was posted as a work item comment.

uxDesign.description: Phase 4 — UX design establishment via Figma extraction or HTML mockup. Skippable for non-visual changes.

designSource.description: How the design was obtained: 'figma' (API extracted), 'figma-manual' (user-provided specs), or 'mockup' (HTML mockup generated).

figmaSpecs.description: Internal: raw extracted Figma properties (intermediate data used to build the mockup). Downstream phases should use mockupUrl instead.

currentUICapture.description: Internal: captured current UI state — HTML/CSS snapshot of the target area (intermediate data used to build the mockup). Downstream phases should use mockupUrl instead.

mockupUrl.description: Azure DevOps attachment URL of the uploaded HTML mockup (persists across sessions).

feedbackRounds.description: User feedback rounds on the design. Format: [{ round, userFeedback, agentRevision, timestamp }].

approvedAt.description: ISO timestamp when user approved the design.

devDesign.description: Phase 5 — deep code analysis, prototyping, and dev design document. Skippable for simple changes.

existingDesignSearch.description: Results of checking for existing dev design documents in hierarchy and wiki.

codeReadProgress.description: Code analysis results: { entryPoints, componentTree, dataFlow, serviceDependencies, filesToChange, findings }.

wikiResearch.description: Findings from Azure DevOps wiki about patterns and conventions.

pastPRs.description: Approaches used in recent PRs in the same code area.

prototype.description: Prototype state: { created, validated, findings, cleanedUp }.

feedbackRounds.description: User feedback rounds. Format: [{ round, userFeedback, agentRevision, timestamp }].

approvedAt.description: ISO timestamp when user approved the design.

devImplementation.description: Phase 6 — implement code changes, validate with build/lint/test and Playwright, capture screenshots.

wikiFindings.description: Coding patterns from Azure DevOps wiki — MUST be an array of strings, not a single string.

filesPlanned.description: Files identified for changes during step 3.

path.description: File path relative to repo root.

changeDescription.description: What will be changed in this file.

filesCompleted.description: Files that have been changed during step 4.

path.description: File path relative to repo root.

diffSummary.description: Summary of the diff (lines added/removed, key changes).

screenshots.description: Screenshots captured via Playwright, uploaded as Azure DevOps attachments.

url.description: Azure DevOps attachment URL (persists across sessions).

validationResults.description: Build, lint, test, and Playwright verification results.

relatedFilesUpdated.description: Storybooks, READMEs, snapshots updated alongside the main changes.

prSubmission.description: Phase 7 — create branch, commit, push, and create Azure DevOps pull request.

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA of the implementation commit.

prUrl.description: Full URL to the pull request.

prIteration.description: Phase 8 — address PR review comments, resolve feedback threads, and fix build failures.

fetchedPRState.description: Current PR state snapshot: active threads, build status, check results.

threadsAddressed.description: Record of every review thread addressed.

action.description: Action taken to address the feedback.

replySent.description: Reply posted to the thread (if any).

verified.description: Whether the fix was verified by rebuild.

pushCommitSha.description: Git commit SHA of the pushed iteration fixes.
